top_signals.title: AI Stock Rally Is in Boom Phase Not Euphoria, BofA Survey Shows
top_signals.summary: The boom in artificial-intelligence stocks looks set to run further, according to a Bank of America Corp. survey, which found the majority of investors believe that the fear of missing out is continuing to drive the trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
